recommendedAction.explanation: Initial old-data draft squad. No transfer action applies because this is a from-scratch provisional squad.

pickTeam.explanation: Agent-authored 3-4-3 using old-data projections. This version keeps premium attackers while reducing club concentration from the earlier draft.

alternatives.upsideCase: Best projection in this selected squad and elite goal volume profile.
alternatives.downsideCase: Stale fixture and price data may not reflect real GW1 context.

alternatives.upsideCase: High minutes, set-piece involvement, and second-best squad projection.
alternatives.downsideCase: Old team and fixture context may be wrong.

alternatives.upsideCase: Strong defensive projection with set-piece threat.
alternatives.downsideCase: Defender captaincy has lower ceiling than premium attackers.

alternatives.upsideCase: Forward slot with good old-data projection at mid-price.
alternatives.downsideCase: Role and minutes need current confirmation.

alternatives.upsideCase: Premium midfielder profile and Arsenal attacking exposure.
alternatives.downsideCase: Projection trails Haaland and Bruno in the stale data.

captaincy.explanation: Captain Haaland because he has the highest old-data projection and best explosive scoring profile. Vice Bruno because he is second in projection and a reliable minutes/set-piece option.

reasons: No GW1 chip should be used from stale data.
Bench boost and triple captain require current fixtures and team news.
warnings: Human manager must confirm any chip manually in the official FPL interface.

reasons: This is an initial squad draft, not a transfer plan.
concerns: Official current-season data is not live in the public FPL API.

confidence.label: low
confidence.explanation: Low confidence because this is explicitly based on stale public FPL data, but this version improves club-risk balance.

risks: Official current-season FPL prices, player IDs, positions, clubs, fixtures, and flags may differ.
The public API data currently points to completed 2025/26 gameweek data.
No current injury, suspension, transfer, or predicted-lineup news has been ingested.
This should be replaced once official current-season FPL data is live.
whatWouldChangeMyMind: Official FPL launch data changes prices, positions, or clubs.
GW1 fixtures make a premium attacker or defender clearly better.
Team news changes expected minutes for Cherki, Kroupi, João Pedro, or the defensive picks.
A current squad is supplied in config/squad.ts.
